'''jagoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dynamitin|dynamitin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-g-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dynamitin|dynamitin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jagoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jægeyeth|jægeyeth]] || [[word:jægeyej|jægeyej]] || [[word:jægeyesh|jægeyesh]] || [[word:jægeye|jægeye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jagogoyoth|jagogoyoth]] || [[word:jagogoyoj|jagogoyoj]] || [[word:jagogoyosh|jagogoyosh]] || [[word:jagogoyo|jagogoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jagoyoth|jagoyoth]] || [[word:jagoyoj|jagoyoj]] || [[word:jagoyosh|jagoyosh]] || [[word:jagoyo|jagoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jagofyoth|jagofyoth]] || [[word:jagofyoj|jagofyoj]] || [[word:jagofyosh|jagofyosh]] || [[word:jagofyof|jagofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jagoyotho|jagoyotho]] || [[word:jagoyojo|jagoyojo]] || [[word:jagoyosho|jagoyosho]] || [[word:jagoyoko|jagoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jagoyoth|jagoyoth]] || [[word:jagoyoj|jagoyoj]] || [[word:jagoyosh|jagoyosh]] || [[word:jagoyo|jagoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jagoyothol|jagoyothol]] || [[word:jagoyojol|jagoyojol]] || [[word:jagoyoshol|jagoyoshol]] || [[word:jagoyokol|jagoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jagoyothotho|jagoyothotho]] || [[word:jagoyojojo|jagoyojojo]] || [[word:jagoyoshosho|jagoyoshosho]] || [[word:jagoyoko|jagoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jagoyothon|jagoyothon]] || [[word:jagoyojon|jagoyojon]] || [[word:jagoyoshon|jagoyoshon]] || [[word:jagoyokon|jagoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jagoyothoro|jagoyothoro]] || [[word:jagoyojoro|jagoyojoro]] || [[word:jagoyoshoro|jagoyoshoro]] || [[word:jagoyokoro|jagoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
